reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The source PDF is a 24-page document. The conversion output explicitly identifies that it has omitted 19 sections (representing pages 4 through 22) due to a token budget constraint. This constitutes a significant loss of the document's primary content, including regional reports, technical updates, and educational announcements.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Pages 4 through 22 of the PDF contain substantial content, including the North Central, South Central, and Western Region reports, 'The Nerd Herd' technical updates, 'Education Station' training info, and 'The Finance Team' updates.

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: In Section 24 (Page 24), the main heading 'WANT TO Share WITH US?' is compromised. The word 'Share', which appears inside an icon in the source, is omitted from the heading text and relegated to image alt-text. Furthermore, the heading is split into two separate heading elements, resulting in the output reading 'WANT TO WITH US?', which changes the meaning and cohesion of the call to action.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The Page 24 heading is 'WANT TO Share WITH US?'.
concerns.output_quote: The heading text is split into two separate elements: 'WANT TO' and 'WITH US?', omitting the word 'Share' from the heading block.

action_items: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.
